steps.t: Rahâzi has suggested that you travel east toward the Orc-encampment of Drushkála so that you might learn more.
Rahâzi stands west of the Orc-encampment of Drushkála and stares at the ships of the Song moored off the shore.
Rahâzi asked you to descend the slope and approach the Orc-encampment of Drushkála, remaining alert for anything out of the ordinary.
What slew this Orc so near to the entrance of Drushkála?
Having slain many Orcs at Drushkála, you should return to the entrance of the Orc-encampment and see if you have drawn the attention of your potential…
Rahâzi stands alongside an unexpected friend near the outer palisade of Drushkála.
Corudan stands outside the Orc-encampment of Drushkála, a good distance from where last you saw him.
